title: 3X Fun Time Strawberry Flavoured Lube 75ml Edible Water Based Personal Lubricant Non Sticky Gel Toy and Condom Friendly Sweet Natural Flavour Smooth and Safe Intimate Gel
features: Sweet Strawberry Flavour-Light and fruity strawberry taste adds a playful touch to your experience
Smooth and Non Sticky-Water based gel glides easily, feels natural and leaves no sticky residue
Condom and Toy Friendly-Compatible with latex, polyisoprene and polyurethane protection as well as personal toys
Easy Pump Dispenser-Convenient pump bottle ensures mess-free and quick application every time
Compact and Travel Friendly-75ml size perfect for everyday use or packing on the go
description: Product description Fun Time Strawberry Flavoured Lube 75ml – Fruity, Smooth and Playful Comfort Fun Time Strawberry Flavoured Lube is made to bring a sweet twist to comfort and ease. This water-based formula offers a silky, non-sticky feel that adds smoothness to personal moments. The soft strawberry taste creates a light and enjoyable experience while helping reduce dryness and friction. Whether for solo care or time together, it's designed to feel clean, fresh and fun. Crafted with body safe ingredients, this lube is suitable for use with latex, polyisoprene, and polyurethane products. It contains no grease or heavy texture and washes off easily with water. The clear, edible gel is also toy-compatible and comes in a pump bottle for easy, mess-free use. Strawberry flavour adds a playful touch without overpowering, and the formula is tested for safety and quality. Whether you’re at home or travelling, the 75ml compact bottle fits easily into your routine. Why You’ll Love It Smooth feel – Non-sticky texture for a soft and comfy experience Water based formula – Toy friendly and safe with all condoms Strawberry taste – Light natural flavour adds a sweet touch Easy pump bottle – Simple mess-free application Clear and gentle – Non greasy and easy to clean after use Compact size – 75ml bottle ideal for travel and regular use Why Choose Fun Time Strawberry Lube Fun Time Flavoured Lubes are made in the UK with safe and tested ingredients. They’re fun, light, and reliable — offering natural-feeling moisture with a playful twist. Whether it’s about making things smoother or just adding something fruity to the moment, this lube is your go-to for taste and comfort in one. When and How to Use Apply a small amount to the desired area before or during your time of need. It’s ideal for reducing dryness and improving glide. The formula is edible, easy to rinse, and leaves no sticky feeling behind. Use as often as needed, with or without toys or protection. Feel the Difference Fun Time Strawberry Flavoured Lube is more than just sweet. It’s made for real moments — soft on skin, simple to use, and quick to clean. You’ll notice the difference in how smooth and natural it feels — with just a little hint of fruity fun. Safety Warning This product is not a contraceptive. Avoid contact with eyes, broken skin, or open wounds. Discontinue use if irritation occurs and consult a doctor if symptoms continue. For external use only. Keep out of reach of children. Store in a cool, dry place. Safety Warning This product is not a contraceptive. Avoid contact with eyes, broken skin, or open wounds
